title: Fundraising Readiness Radar
promise: Fundraising readiness diagnostic for narrative, traction, process, targeting, and deal preparation.
audience: Pre-seed to Series A founders, accelerators, venture studios, and fundraising advisors
description: Readiness assessment across Narrative & Ambition, Evidence & Traction, Process & Targeting, Deal Readiness. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: Fundraising readiness diagnostic for narrative, traction, process, targeting, and deal preparation.
